summary: Owner's story of Gunner, a 10-year-old Quarter horse who developed pastern-joint arthritis after a barbed-wire injury, covering his rescue, vet exam and farrier care.
Cavallo community roundup covering a laminitis podcast on Horse Chats Australia and Emma Massingale's film 'The Highlands' about traveling at liberty across the Scottish highlands.
Profile of barefoot trimmer Connie Challice and her horse teams at the 2019 Calgary Stampede parade, with testimonial on Cavallo BFB and ELB Bling boots on slick asphalt.
January 2020 customer testimonials roundup, including a Mustang named Lumpy whose hoof crack stopped after using Cavallo Bling Boots on muddy, rocky Tennessee trails.
Carole Herder's reflective piece on the motivation to feed and care for horses during brutal cold winter weather on British Columbia's Sunshine Coast.
Recap of Carole's guest appearance on Horsemanship Radio with Debbie Loucks discussing laminitis prevention and treatment, plus Cavallo boots for hoof healing.
Customer story from Estonia about a mare named Ralla recovering from a laminitis attack using Cavallo Hoof Boots and Gel Pads on frozen winter ground.
Cavallo community roundup featuring We Ride Sport & Trail Magazine, a WKU hoof-boot load study, Emma Massingale video, Trailmeister and Equi-Ads UK newsletter highlights.
Product announcement of new Cavallo sizes: BFB (Big Foot Boot) sizes 7 and 9 and CLB (Cute Little Boot) regular soles for mini/pony hooves, with customer testimonials.
Carole Herder's guide to treating hoof abscesses in horses, covering origin, spread direction, healing conditions and using Cavallo boots and pads for comfort.
April 2020 customer testimonials roundup praising Cavallo Trek Boots and mini boots staying on through mud bogs, rivers and protecting unshod hooves.
Carole Herder's reflective essay on managing fear and anxiety, using horses as mirrors of our emotions and learning to let the horse lead the way.
